name: Coder Design System
description: Single source of truth for the Etabli suite. Every app derives color, type, spacing, and theming from this file. Do not hardcode values in any app - copy them from here at build time.

accent.description: Etabli signature green. Primary action, selection, brand.

theming.note: All three modes are mandatory in every app. System follows OS setting.

icon.baseGlyph: Rounded square tile, accent-green fill (#28A745), white mark centered.
icon.cornerRadius: 22% of canvas (iOS superellipse handled by OS; ship square master).
icon.note: Each app overlays ONE distinct white line-glyph on the shared green tile so the suite reads as a family. See icons/ICON_SPEC.md.
